title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
